text.title: GuardrailsPipeline Architecture
text.summary: Complete guardrails pipeline: GuardrailConfig/GuardrailResult dataclasses, input processing (PII, injection, moderation), output processing (moderation, hallucination, custom validators), and an async variant.

section.title: Config and Result dataclasses

rule.statement: Define GuardrailConfig at application startup; never hardcode thresholds inside validator functions.
rule.rationale: Centralizing config enables tuning without code changes and makes the security posture auditable.

section.reference: GuardrailConfig, GuardrailResult, and GuardrailsPipeline production class

rule.statement: Run rule-based injection checks first (microseconds), then API-based content moderation (~100ms), then LLM-based checks only if required by config.
rule.rationale: Layering by cost prevents slow checks from running on traffic that fast checks would block.

example.note: Returns None for sanitized_input when the request must be blocked, not just logged.

rule.statement: Run output moderation before hallucination detection; hallucination detection is optional and expensive — enable only when context is available and stakes are high.
rule.rationale: Without a context document, hallucination detection is guesswork. Moderation is always relevant.

rule.statement: Never catch exceptions silently inside validators — a failed guardrail check must fail loudly, not pass through.
rule.rationale: Silent swallowing of guardrail errors turns safety failures into invisible pass-throughs.

rule.statement: For high-throughput applications, run input checks in parallel using ThreadPoolExecutor; collect all results before deciding to pass or block.
rule.rationale: Sequential checks add latency proportional to the number of checks; parallel reduces it to the slowest single check.

example.code: async def process_input_async(self, user_input: str): with ThreadPoolExecutor() as executor: loop = asyncio.get_event_loop() pii_check = loop.run_in_executor(executor, self.input_guardrails.validate, user_input) injection_check = loop.run_in_executor(executor, self.injection_detector.detect, user_input) moderation_check = loop.run_in_executor(executor, self.content_moderator.moderate, user_input) results = await asyncio.gather(pii_check, injection_check, moderation_check) return self._process_results(results)
